mapper.insert:
SELECT tradePost_seq.NEXTVAL from dual
INSERT INTO tradePost (tradePostNo, tradeTitle, tradeContent, cost, status, memberNo, createDate) VALUES (#{tradePostNo}, #{tradeTitle}, #{tradeContent}, #{cost}, #{status}, #{memberNo}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE tradePost SET tradeTitle = #{tradeTitle}, cost = #{cost}, tradeContent = #{tradeContent}, createDate = SYSDATE WHERE tradePostNo = #{tradePostNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tradePost WHERE tradePostNo = #{tradePostNo} AND status = 'AVAILABLE'
mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY tp.tradePostNo ASC) AS rn, tp.tradePostNo, tp.tradeTitle, tp.cost, tp.status, tp.createDate, m.memberName, (SELECT ti.tradeImgUrl FROM tradeImage ti WHERE ti.tradePostNo = tp.tradePostNo AND ROWNUM = 1) AS thumbnailUrl FROM tradePost tp JOIN member m ON tp.memberNo = m.memberNo ORDER BY tp.tradePostNo DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT tp.tradePostNo, tp.tradeTitle, tp.memberNo, m.memberName, tp.cost, tp.status, tp.createDate, (SELECT ti.tradeImgUrl FROM tradeImage ti WHERE ti.tradePostNo = tp.tradePostNo AND ROWNUM = 1) AS thumbnailUrl, COUNT(*) OVER () AS totalCount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY tp.tradePostNo DESC) AS rn FROM tradePost tp JOIN member m ON tp.memberNo = m.memberNo ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow} ORDER BY rn ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT tp.tradePostNo, tp.tradeTitle, tp.memberNo, m.memberName, tp.cost, tp.status, tp.createDate, (SELECT ti.tradeImgUrl FROM tradeImage ti WHERE ti.tradePostNo = tp.tradePostNo AND ROWNUM = 1) AS thumbnailUrl, COUNT(*) OVER () AS totalCount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY tp.tradePostNo DESC) AS rn FROM tradePost tp JOIN member m ON tp.memberNo = m.memberNo
tp.tradeTitle LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
tp.tradeContent LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
m.memberName LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow} ORDER BY rn DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tradePost tp JOIN member m ON tp.memberNo = m.memberNo
tp.tradeTitle LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
tp.tradeContent LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
m.memberName LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT tp.tradePostNo, tp.tradeTitle, tp.tradeContent, tp.cost, tp.status, tp.memberNo, tp.createDate, m.memberName, (SELECT ti.tradeImgUrl FROM tradeImage ti WHERE ti.tradePostNo = tp.tradePostNo AND ROWNUM = 1) AS thumbnailUrl FROM tradePost tp JOIN member m ON tp.memberNo = m.memberNo WHERE tp.tradePostNo = #{tradePostNo}
